title: Tach Receipt
description: Durable proof that an effectful action ran (receipts/<id>.json). Keyed by an idempotency key derived from (run_id, action_id, tool, input); re-entering the same action on resume finds this receipt and skips the tool call, so a side effect happens exactly once.

idempotency_key.description: Stable key for the effect; the same key is never executed twice within a run.

tool.description: The fake tool invoked, e.g. fake.stripe.refund.

input.description: The exact input passed to the tool.

output.description: The tool's recorded result — the proof of the effect.
